<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a registered feature"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/registry/features/{feature_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return a registered feature by feature_id.

HTTP 404 — feature not found.
